query:
INSERT INTO cars (make, model, year, trim, color, mileage, price, `condition`, transmission, fuelType, bodyType, engineSize, doors, seats, description, features, status, featured) VALUES
('Toyota', 'Camry', 2023, 'XSE V6', 'Midnight Black', 0, '32500.00', 'new', 'automatic', 'petrol', 'sedan', '3.5L V6', 4, 5, 'The 2023 Toyota Camry XSE V6 delivers an exhilarating driving experience with its powerful V6 engine and sport-tuned suspension. Features premium interior with leather seats and advanced safety technology.', '["Leather Seats","Sunroof","Navigation","Apple CarPlay","Android Auto","Blind Spot Monitor","Lane Departure Warning","Adaptive Cruise Control","Heated Seats","JBL Sound System"]', 'available', 1),
('BMW', '5 Series', 2022, '530i M Sport', 'Alpine White', 18500, '52000.00', 'used', 'automatic', 'petrol', 'sedan', '2.0L TwinPower Turbo', 4, 5, 'Elegant and sporty, this BMW 530i M Sport combines luxury with performance. Low mileage, single owner, full BMW service history. Loaded with premium features.', '["M Sport Package","Harman Kardon Audio","Panoramic Sunroof","Heads-Up Display","Parking Assistant","Wireless Charging","Ambient Lighting","Heated Steering Wheel"]', 'available', 1),
('Mercedes-Benz', 'GLE 450', 2023, 'AMG Line', 'Obsidian Black', 0, '78000.00', 'new', 'automatic', 'hybrid', 'suv', '3.0L Inline-6 MHEV', 4, 7, 'The GLE 450 combines SUV practicality with Mercedes-Benz luxury. The mild hybrid system delivers exceptional efficiency without compromising performance.', '["MBUX Infotainment","Burmester Sound","Air Suspension","360 Camera","Night Package","AMG Styling","Third Row Seating","Wireless Charging"]', 'available', 1),
('Honda', 'Civic', 2023, 'Sport Touring', 'Sonic Gray Pearl', 0, '29500.00', 'new', 'cvt', 'petrol', 'sedan', '1.5L VTEC Turbo', 4, 5, 'The all-new Honda Civic Sport Touring is packed with technology and style. The turbocharged engine delivers impressive performance with excellent fuel economy.', '["Honda Sensing","Wireless Apple CarPlay","Bose Audio","Heated Seats","Remote Start","LED Headlights","Sport Pedals"]', 'available', 0),
('Ford', 'F-150', 2022, 'Lariat 4x4', 'Iconic Silver', 22000, '48000.00', 'certified', 'automatic', 'petrol', 'truck', '3.5L EcoBoost V6', 4, 5, 'The Ford F-150 Lariat is America\'s best-selling truck for good reason. This certified pre-owned example comes with full Ford warranty and has been thoroughly inspected.', '["4x4","Tow Package","FordPass Connect","B&O Sound","Heated/Cooled Seats","Pro Trailer Backup Assist","360 Camera","Bed Liner"]', 'available', 1),
('Audi', 'Q7', 2022, '55 TFSI Quattro', 'Glacier White', 15000, '68000.00', 'certified', 'automatic', 'petrol', 'suv', '3.0L TFSI V6', 4, 7, 'The Audi Q7 55 TFSI Quattro offers a perfect blend of luxury, technology, and all-weather capability. Certified Pre-Owned with full Audi warranty.', '["Quattro AWD","Virtual Cockpit","Bang & Olufsen Audio","Panoramic Sunroof","Massage Seats","Night Vision","Head-Up Display","Air Suspension"]', 'available', 0),
('Tesla', 'Model 3', 2023, 'Long Range AWD', 'Deep Blue Metallic', 5000, '45000.00', 'used', 'automatic', 'electric', 'sedan', 'Dual Motor Electric', 4, 5, 'Nearly new Tesla Model 3 Long Range AWD with autopilot. 358-mile range, over-the-air updates, and access to Tesla Supercharger network. No gas, no oil changes.', '["Autopilot","Full Self-Driving Capability","Glass Roof","Premium Audio","Heated Seats","Wireless Charging","15\" Touchscreen","Over-the-Air Updates"]', 'available', 1),
('Porsche', 'Cayenne', 2021, 'S AWD', 'Carrara White', 28000, '89000.00', 'used', 'automatic', 'petrol', 'suv', '2.9L Twin-Turbo V6', 4, 5, 'The Porsche Cayenne S delivers sports car performance in an SUV package. This example has been meticulously maintained with full Porsche service history.', '["Sport Chrono Package","PASM Air Suspension","Bose Surround Sound","Panoramic Roof","Night Vision","360 Camera","Heated/Ventilated Seats"]', 'available', 0),
('Toyota', 'RAV4', 2023, 'XLE Premium Hybrid', 'Magnetic Gray', 0, '38000.00', 'new', 'automatic', 'hybrid', 'suv', '2.5L Hybrid', 4, 5, 'The Toyota RAV4 Hybrid XLE Premium combines the practicality of an SUV with outstanding fuel efficiency. Toyota Safety Sense 2.0 included as standard.', '["Toyota Safety Sense 2.0","Wireless Charging","Heated Seats","Power Liftgate","Dual Zone Climate","SiriusXM","Star Safety System"]', 'available', 0),
('Chevrolet', 'Corvette', 2022, 'Stingray 3LT', 'Torch Red', 8000, '72000.00', 'used', 'automatic', 'petrol', 'coupe', '6.2L V8', 2, 2, 'The mid-engine C8 Corvette Stingray is America\'s supercar. This 3LT example is loaded with every option including the Z51 Performance Package.', '["Z51 Performance Package","Magnetic Ride Control","Bose Performance Audio","Head-Up Display","Front Lift","GT2 Bucket Seats","Carbon Fiber Interior"]', 'available', 1);
command:
